title: Gaimon Guards the Island of Rare Animals
description: On pages 17–19, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 200 men searched this area and didn't find a thing in three weeks...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...except for this broken empty treasure chest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey Gaimon, what are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We only searched around this area

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But, nobody has ever climbed up there...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I couldn't believe what I saw with my own eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: By the time I woke up, I was already stuck in this chest...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I strug- gled, crawling to the shore,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But my company-ions had left me

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can't climb, unless I leave this chest... Lemme out! Lemme out!

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: No one came to this island in the past 20 years?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They were all pirates looking for the treasure, but I used the "forest judge- ment" to scare them all away!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
